status.info: We use this protocol and it's working

steps.step: {"blocks":[{"key":"5guim","text":"Take brain tissue sample out of   freezer and put on dry ice. Transfer the sample from the bag or tube to a petri dish and carefully cut a small piece off with a surgical blade, keeping it on dry ice. Replace the remaining piece in the bag and put the small piece in a labeled Eppendorf tube. Keep the Eppendorf tube on dry ice. Repeat for all samples, using a different petri dish and surgical blade for a new sample.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":32,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"c9k6u","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"error_temperature":false,"guid":"9028F6F0AE3B11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"temperature":"-80","unit":10}}}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"6i45e","text":"Optional: Weigh Eppendorf tubes if needed and record weights.   per sample.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":62,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"bkjg3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"50","error":false,"guid":"4B40EE20AE3C11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":5}}}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"5lkqp","text":"Pour   per sample of sucrose homogenization buffer into 50 mL Falcon tube and place  . Add   of RNase Inhibitor ( ) per mL of homogenization buffer. Shake tube to mix.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":5,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":84,"length":1},{"key":2,"offset":91,"length":1},{"key":3,"offset":113,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"547i4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"25","error":false,"guid":"53E72210AE3C11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":2}},"1":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"error_temperature":false,"guid":"5D115310AE3C11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"temperature":"","unit":165}},"2":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"1","error":false,"guid":"6176D010AE3C11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":1}},"3":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"40","error":false,"guid":"714A7AA0AE3C11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":1923}}}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"dlhhe","text":"Pipette   homogenization buffer with RNase Inhibitor into 15 mL Dounce tissue grinder  . Add tissue piece and homogenize. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":8,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":86,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"62a5e","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"6gda1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"15","error":false,"guid":"ABC1AC30AE3C11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":2}},"1":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"error_temperature":false,"guid":"AFEEB410AE3C11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"temperature":"","unit":165}},"2":{"type":"notes","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"blocks":[{"data":{},"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[{"length":5,"offset":0,"style":"bold"}],"key":"btc7b","text":"Note: Slowly break big tissues (first 3-4 strokes up and down), then dounce up and down 10 times with the “loose” pestle followed by 10 times with the “tight” pestle. ","type":"unstyled"},{"data":{},"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"fjag5","text":"","type":"unstyled"},{"data":{},"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[{"length":4,"offset":0,"style":"bold"}],"key":"cmial","text":"Note: Pull the pestle out slowly to avoid spilling. Each sample takes 5-10 minutes.","type":"unstyled"},{"data":{},"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"7vb37","text":"","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{}}}}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"3mbqq","text":"Label bottom of 50-mL ultracentrifuge tube (in case it breaks in the centrifuge). Pipette   fresh homogenization buffer to the tube as a cushion, and carefully pour the   of homogenate on top of it to maintain two separate layers.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":90,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":169,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"5q6ai","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"10","error":false,"guid":"D3D7D190AE3C11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":2}},"1":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"15","error":false,"guid":"D793C820AE3C11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":2}}}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"937rr","text":"Place the ultracentrifuge tubes in the swing buckets. Weigh and balance the buckets containing the samples by adding a few drops of fresh homogenization buffer to the top.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"6ctg3","text":"Ultracentrifuge at   in SW28 rotor for ultracentrifuge. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":19,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"f819u","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"f4ara","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"centrifuge","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"centrifuge":"25000","duration":3600,"error_centrifuge":false,"error_temperature":false,"guid":"E42C44E0AE3C11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","pause":null,"preset":[],"scientificNotation":{"centrifuge":false,"temperature":false},"start":null,"temperature":"4","temperatureUnit":10,"unit":33}},"1":{"type":"notes","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"blocks":[{"data":{},"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"a7evq","text":"Do not use a fixed angle rotor. Always use a swinging bucket. ","type":"unordered-list-item"},{"data":{},"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"816nl","text":"Thin wall 50-mL tube: BECKMAN 344058 (Tube, Thinwall, Ultra-Clear™) ","type":"unordered-list-item"},{"data":{},"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[{"length":14,"offset":0,"style":"bold"}],"key":"aj9h9","text":"Wash glassware: Rinse each piece with tap water 10 times. Then rinse with MilliQ water 5 times. Lay out to dry on paper towels. Once dry, rinse one time with DNase-, RNase-free water, air dry and store for next time.","type":"unordered-list-item"}],"entityMap":{}}}}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"f5dif","text":"Add   RNase Inhibitor ( ) per mL of nuclei suspension buffer, making   total buffer per sample. Mix and place  .","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":4,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":23,"length":1},{"key":2,"offset":69,"length":1},{"key":3,"offset":110,"length":1}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"2","error":false,"guid":"4FDFAE20AE3D11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":1}},"1":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"40","error":false,"guid":"5EBC7590AE3D11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":1923}},"2":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"5","error":false,"guid":"65F0F110AE3D11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":2}},"3":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"error_temperature":false,"guid":"695EA090AE3D11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"temperature":"","unit":165}}}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"fkhob","text":"Remove all the supernatant by pouring off into a petri dish. Place upside-down in petri dish for a few seconds. Cut off the wall of the thin centrifuge tube with a clean razor blade.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"e480e","text":"Resuspend the nuclei pellet at the bottom of the cut ultracentrifuge tube in   nuclei suspension buffer. Pipette gently up and down in the solution 10–20 times. Transfer this buffer into a labeled Eppendorf tube and repeat with an additional   nuclei suspension buffer. Place  .","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":77,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":242,"length":1},{"key":2,"offset":276,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"v3o7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"500","error":false,"guid":"811B4990AE3D11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":1}},"1":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"500","error":false,"guid":"937577F0AE3D11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":1}},"2":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"error_temperature":false,"guid":"993E7C90AE3D11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"temperature":"","unit":165}}}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"3obev","text":"In a new labeled Eppendorf tube, make a 1:1 dilution of the nuclei suspension and Trypan Blue. Count nuclei (round blue dots) using haemocytometer slide (C-Chip, DHCN015). Count each 4x4 grid at the corners and average the counts.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"cqe5t","text":"Concentration of the nuclei: Average count x 2 (dilution in Trypan Blue) x 104/mL.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":77,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"c0jc8","text":"Spin down nuclei at   and 9 acceleration/deceleration for  .","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":20,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":58,"length":1}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"centrifuge","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"centrifuge":"800","duration":0,"error_centrifuge":false,"error_temperature":false,"guid":"D5978D80AE3D11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","pause":null,"preset":[],"scientificNotation":{"centrifuge":false,"temperature":false},"start":null,"temperature":"4","temperatureUnit":10,"unit":34}},"1":{"type":"duration","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"duration":600,"guid":"ED035760AE3D11ECB9225F032C580DA8","id":0,"label":"","pause":null,"preset":[],"start":null}}}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"bdt93","text":"Carefully remove supernatant with pipette.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"74po5","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"fb576","text":" Resuspend in nuclei suspension buffer: the ideal concentration for 10X is 1000 nuclei/μL.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"notes","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"blocks":[{"data":{},"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"7p2b9","text":" Do not disturb the pellet at the bottom.","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{}}}}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"1isjo","text":"Make a new 1:1 dilution of the nuclei suspension and Trypan Blue. Recount nuclei to ensure the concentration is adequate for 10x (700-1200 nuclei/μL). Ideally, there would be 50 nuclei per 4x4 grid in the haemocytometer slide.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"cv2k9","text":"Submit samples for 10x Genomics Chromium loading (single cell 3’ V3.1 chemistry).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
